description_short: A three-piece ergonomic system for your car, designed to keep your body aligned and comfortable during every drive.

faq_specs.question: What is included in the SleepyCat Ergo Car Bundle?
faq_specs.answer: The bundle includes Car Neck Cushion, Car Back Cushion, Car Seat Cushion, designed to provide complete comfort and ergonomic support while driving.

notes_observed: URL slug = ergo-car-bundle, product name = Pro Car Bundle (rebrand). 3-piece bundle (neck+back+seat) at ₹3442 vs Ergo Chair Bundle (2-piece) at ₹3448. Same components likely just different naming.
